about.title: About
about.bio1: I'm a digital craftsman with 6+ years of experience building products, focused on bridging the gap between human emotion and machine logic.
about.bio2: Currently exploring the intersection of AI-driven interfaces and procedural geometry.
about.bio3: When I'm not at my editor, you'll find me hiking mountain trails, photographing brutalist architecture, or brewing the perfect pour-over.

timeline.title: The Roadmap
timeline.subtitle: Key milestones from my 2017 internship to the present.

y2017.title: First Steps
y2017.desc: Entered the industry as an intern, witnessing the transition from jQuery to modern frameworks.

y2019.title: Full-Stack Leap
y2019.desc: Deepened expertise in React/Vue ecosystems and started Node.js backend development for multi-platform coverage.

y2022.title: Efficiency Revolution
y2022.desc: Focused on automation scripts and tooling, optimizing workflows with Python and Node.js.

y2024.title: AI Lab
y2024.desc: Fully embraced AI-driven development, exploring prompt engineering and multimodal interaction.

y2025.title: Intelligent Systems
y2025.desc: Leading AI projects with deep integration of voice/video communication and digital avatar generation.

footer.defaultDescription: Exploring the frontier of technology, design, and human potential through a minimalist lens.

hero.badge: Exploring the frontier of tech & design
hero.description: Focused on minimalist design systems and high-performance app development, transforming complex requirements into seamless, intuitive user experiences.
